title: Speedboat Rental in Benalmadena Marina: Prices and Tips for 2026
html:
Renting a speedboat in Benalmadena Marina means skimming the Costa del Sol at your own pace, with prices starting from around €250 for a half-day hire with fuel included. BoatHire24 connects you directly with local owners offering everything from nimble bowsiders to luxury cruisers, all moored within the marina's 1,000-berth harbour.

Where to set off in Benalmadena Marina

You can launch from several points along the Costa del Sol. The main departure is Benalmadena Marina itself, with its easy access to the Mediterranean. Other popular spots include Puerto Marina in the heart of Benalmadena, and the nearby Puerto Deportivo in Fuengirola about four nautical miles west.

From there, head to Cala de Mijas for a quiet swim spot, or cruise east to the Cabopino sand dunes. Torremolinos and the Bajondillo beach are also within easy reach. The marina's location makes a trip to the rock of Gibraltar a full-day adventure, roughly 45 nautical miles south.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat in Benalmadena Marina?

Prices for a speedboat rental in Benalmadena Marina range from €180 for a two-hour guided tour to €500 for a full-day self-drive hire. Fuel is often included in the daily rate, but always check the listing.

For those looking to explore with a local captain, skippered charters in Benalmadena Marina offer a safe way to discover hidden coves without needing a licence. A typical half-day skipper-led trip costs around €350 for up to eight guests.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right speedboat depends on your group size and how you plan to use the day. Here are four popular options listed on BoatHire24.

  1. Bowrider speedboat, perfect for families and watersports, seating 6, 8 guests, from €250 per half-day.
  2. Cabin cruiser, offers a small cabin and toilet for day trips, accommodating 8, 10 guests, from €400 per half-day.
  3. Rib (rigid inflatable boat), agile and fast for adrenaline seekers, carrying 6, 8 guests, from €200 per two-hour trip.
  4. Luxury sports boat, sleek lines from brands such as Axopar or Quicksilver, designed for style and speed, seating 8, 10 guests, from €600 per full-day.
  5. Open-deck motorboat, versatile and easy to handle, ideal for exploring the coastline, carrying 8, 12 guests, from €300 per half-day.

One of the most popular models on the platform is the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open, 150 HP, which offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort for a day on the water. You can view the QuickSilver Activ 605 Open - 150 HP charter page for live availability and pricing.

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Benalmadena Marina?

Yes, a valid recreational boating licence is required to drive a speedboat in Spain, but you can hire a skipper if you do not hold one. The Spanish authorities recognise the International Certificate of Competence (ICC) and national licences from most EU countries. The charter operator will confirm the exact requirements before you book.

A top tip for first-timers: if you book a skippered charter, ask the captain to include a stop at Cala de Mijas. It is a sheltered cove with calm turquoise water, perfect for a swim and a picnic, and much quieter than the main beaches.

At a glance

  • Price band: €180 to €600 per rental
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence needed: Yes, or hire a skipper

Questions about boat rental in Benalmadena Marina

Can I rent a speedboat without a licence in Benalmadena Marina?

Yes, you can book a skippered charter where the captain holds the licence and operates the boat for you.

What is the best time of year to rent a speedboat on the Costa del Sol?

The summer months from June to September offer the warmest weather and calmest seas, ideal for speedboat trips.

How far can I travel from Benalmadena Marina in a half-day rental?

With a half-day trip you can comfortably reach Cabopino or Fuengirola, about 10 nautical miles, and enjoy a couple of hours swimming and exploring.

Is fuel included in the price of a speedboat rental?

Many owners include fuel in the half-day and full-day rates, but always read the listing details and confirm at the time of booking.

Closing thoughts

Booking through the BoatHire24 marketplace gives you verified boats and transparent pricing, so you can compare options from trusted owners. If you own a speedboat in the region, you can list your vessel on the platform and earn income when it is not in use. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Benalmadena Marina or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Benalmadena Marina and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
